mapper.sql: couponId, userId, goodsId, couponStatus, validityTime, couponPrice, createdDate, limitPrice, couponType, couponNew, storeAddrIds, couponTitle, fitCardIds
mapper.insert:
insert into coupon
couponId,
userId,
goodsId,
couponStatus,
validityTime,
couponPrice,
createdDate,
limitPrice,
couponType,
couponNew,
storeAddrIds,
couponTitle,
fitCardIds,
#{couponId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{goodsId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{couponStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{validityTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{couponPrice,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{limitPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{couponType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{couponNew,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{storeAddrIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{couponTitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{fitCardIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update coupon
userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
goodsId = #{goodsId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
couponStatus = #{couponStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
validityTime = #{validityTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
couponPrice = #{couponPrice,jdbcType=INTEGER},
createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
limitPrice = #{limitPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
couponType = #{couponType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
couponNew = #{couponNew,jdbcType=INTEGER},
storeAddrIds = #{storeAddrIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
couponTitle = #{couponTitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
fitCardIds = #{fitCardIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where couponId = #{couponId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select couponStatus, date_format(validityTime, '%Y-%m-%d') as validityTime, concat(couponPrice,'') as couponPrice, limitPrice, couponType, couponNew, storeAddrIds, couponTitle,fitCardIds from coupon where userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} order by validityTime desc LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
select count(*) from coupon where userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM coupon c INNER JOIN user_info u ON c.userId = u.userId AND u.isDel = 0 CROSS JOIN user_info cur WHERE cur.userId = #{userId} AND cur.isDel = 0 AND c.couponNew = 1 AND ( (IFNULL(cur.phone, '') != '' AND u.phone = cur.phone) OR (IFNULL(cur.openId, '') != '' AND ( u.openId = cur.openId OR u.gzhOpenId = cur.openId OR u.zfbOpenId = cur.openId OR u.wtOpenId = cur.openId)) OR (IFNULL(cur.gzhOpenId, '') != '' AND ( u.openId = cur.gzhOpenId OR u.gzhOpenId = cur.gzhOpenId OR u.zfbOpenId = cur.gzhOpenId OR u.wtOpenId = cur.gzhOpenId)) OR (IFNULL(cur.zfbOpenId, '') != '' AND ( u.openId = cur.zfbOpenId OR u.gzhOpenId = cur.zfbOpenId OR u.zfbOpenId = cur.zfbOpenId OR u.wtOpenId = cur.zfbOpenId)) OR (IFNULL(cur.wtOpenId, '') != '' AND ( u.openId = cur.wtOpenId OR u.gzhOpenId = cur.wtOpenId OR u.zfbOpenId = cur.wtOpenId OR u.wtOpenId = cur.wtOpenId)) )
SELECT couponId, userId, goodsId, couponStatus, validityTime, couponPrice, createdDate, limitPrice, couponType, couponNew, storeAddrIds, couponTitle,fitCardIds FROM coupon WHERE couponStatus = 0
